zh.lifeSummary: 當Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles於1360年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾時，他的父親John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles40歲，母親Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland24歲。他於1395年10月8日與Mariota Leslie在蘇格蘭洛-爾丁瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1411年登記服兵役。他去世於1423年5月8日在蘇格蘭洛-爾丁瓦爾享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛-爾丁瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles was born in 1360, in Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, was 40 and his mother, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, was 24. He married Mariota Leslie on 8 October 1395, in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1411. He died on 8 May 1423, in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles est né en 1360, à Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mariota Leslie le 8 octobre 1395, à Dingwall, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1411. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1423, à Dingwall, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Dingwall, Ross-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles 1360 in Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles 40 und seine Mutter Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland 24. Er hat am 8. Oktober 1395 in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland Mariota Leslie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1411 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 8. ja.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Islesが1360年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父John Carrach MacDonald of the Islesは40歳，母Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotlandは24歳であった。1395年10月8日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアディングワルでMariota Leslieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1411年に兵役登録をした。彼は1423年5月8日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアディングワルで63歳で死去し，スコットランドロス-シュアイアディングワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles(이)가 1360년 스컷랜드 로스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1395년 10월 8일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 딩월에서 Mariota Leslie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1411년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1423년 5월 8일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 딩월에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 로스-실르 딩월에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Mariota Leslie em 8 de outubro de 1395, em Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1411. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles родился в 1360 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariota Leslie 8 октября 1395 г. в местности дингвалл, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. В 1411 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 8 мая 1423 г. в местности дингвалл, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности дингвалл, росс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles nació en 1360, en Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, John Carrach MacDonald of the Isles, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Princess Margaret Stewart of Scotland, tenía 24 años.
